home.subtitle: I'm a developer and web designer based in Rotterdam, passionate about creativity and bringing pixel-perfect designs to life.
home.faqSubtitle:
Holy FAQ! 🤯 Still have questions?
Here are some frequently asked questions

faq.question: What kind of projects do you take on?
faq.answer: I work on front-end projects ranging from portfolio sites and landing pages to more complex web applications. I focus on clean design, smooth interactions, and pixel-perfect implementation.

faq.question: Are you available for freelance work?
faq.answer: No! I'm currently not open to freelance projects. However feel free to reach out at info@seansupply.com and we can talk about what you have in mind.

faq.question: What tools and technologies do you use?
faq.answer: I primarily work with React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS on the front-end. For design I use Figma, and I deploy most projects on Vercel.

faq.question: Do you also do design, or just development?
faq.answer: Both! I enjoy the full process from design to development. I can take a project from a rough idea all the way to a live, polished website.
